name: custera-hris
description: Original full-stack HR information system starter with employee, leave, claims, attendance, payroll, documents and approvals.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @custera/api" "npm run dev -w @custera/web"
scripts.check: npm run check -w @custera/api && npm run build -w @custera/web
